from langchain_chroma import Chroma
from langchain_huggingface import HuggingFaceEmbeddings
import collections

db = Chroma\(persist_directory='./memory_db', embedding_function=None, collection_name='memory'\)
raw = db.get\(\)
dates = [m.get\('date', 'unknown'\) for m in raw.get\('metadatas', []\)]
counter = collections.Counter\(dates\)
for d, c in sorted\(counter.items\(\)\)[-20:]:
    print\(f'{d}: {c}개'\)
print\(f'총 {len\(dates\)}개 문서'\)
")

Bash(cd "C:/Users/40052797/Desktop/vLLM_memory_layer_ver2" && .venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
import chromadb, collections
client = chromadb.PersistentClient\(path='./memory_db'\)
col = client.get_collection\('memory'\)
raw = col.get\(\)
dates = [m.get\('date', 'unknown'\) for m in raw.get\('metadatas', []\)]
counter = collections.Counter\(dates\)
for d, c in sorted\(counter.items\(\)\)[-20:]:
    print\(f'{d}: {c}'\)
print\(f'total: {len\(dates\)}'\)
" 2>&1 | cat)
